verse.name: v1
verse.lines: More of the river of God in my life More of the flow of your spirit More of your love and your grace and your might More of the power of your presence Lord, I need more of you Lord, I need more of you

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord fill my life with the fire of your love Fill me with power and strength from above Pour out your mercy your grace flowing free So that all of the world may see That Jesus is living in me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Ocean of love that will never run dry Fill me with fire and cleanse me inside Infinite surge of the sacred supply Flow down from the father on high More, Lord, Oh more is my cry
